title: Manufacturing Engineer - Himalaya Drug Company - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Himalaya Drug Company - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!
